description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and global variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay and GIT_STRATEGY=none. Define stages build, test, review, staging, production, cleanup. In the build stage add a build job that runs before_script `docker login -u \"gitlab-ci-token\" -p \"$CI_BUILD_TOKEN\" $CI_REGISTRY` then executes `docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\" .` and `docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\"`, and runs for all branches except tags. In the review stage add a create-review job with before_script `set -euo pipefail`, `wget -qO- https://toolbelt.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh`, `docker login -u \"gitlab-ci-token\" -p \"$CI_BUILD_TOKEN\" $CI_REGISTRY` that runs for non-master, non-tag commits, then runs `heroku create $HEROKU_APP-CI_BUILD_REF_NAME`, `docker pull \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\"`, `heroku container:login`, and `heroku container:push --app $HEROKU_APP-CI_BUILD_REF_NAME`. Add an auto-deploy-master job in the staging stage with environment staging (url https://$HEROKU_APP-staging.herokuapp.com) that runs only on master and executes `docker login --username=_ --password=$HEROKU_API_KEY registry.heroku.com`, `docker pull \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\"`, `docker tag \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\" registry.heroku.com/$HEROKU_APP-staging/web`, and `docker push registry.heroku.com/$HEROKU_APP-staging/web`. Add an auto-deploy-tags job in the production stage with environment production (url https://$HEROKU_APP.herokuapp.com) that runs only on tags and runs the same four docker commands but tags to `registry.heroku.com/$HEROKU_APP/web`. Add manual deploy-to-production and deploy-to-staging jobs that reuse the respective scripts for production and staging, with deploy-to-production limited to master and deploy-to-staging excluded from master and tags. Finally, add a stop-review job in the cleanup stage that runs manually for review environments, runs before_script `set -euo pipefail` and `wget -qO- https://toolbelt.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh`, and executes `heroku destroy --confirm $HEROKU_APP-CI_BUILD_REF_NAME`.
